summary:
HEAVENLY LANDSCAPES AND THE RAPTURE: Brandon recounts a profound spiritual vision he received as a birthday gift from the Lord, depicting the immediate aftermath of the Rapture. In this vision, Brandon and Diana possess youthful, glorified bodies and explore a massive, planet-like heaven, estimated to be three times the size of Jupiter. Brandon describes a breathtaking landscape featuring snow-capped mountains reminiscent of the Swiss Alps, translucent green grass, beautiful flowers, and a serene lake. The environment is devoid of darkness and shadows, glowing perfectly with an ambient temperature of around 65 to 70 degrees, where Diana joyfully performs cartwheels in celebration of their arrival.

THE MARRIAGE SUPPER PREPARATIONS: Brandon details looking through a spiritual portal above his living room to witness Jesus preparing the marriage supper of the Lamb. Brandon observes millions of personalized place settings on beautifully engraved, glossy wooden tables. Every detail is meticulously tailored to individual earthly desires, such as Brandon's own plate shaped like a pink translucent lily, reflecting his love for landscaping and flowers, while others feature white china or even chopsticks. The grand reception is illuminated by Holy Spirit-powered twinkle lights resembling lightning bugs, wrapped in tulle and lace around massive, moss-draped oak trees, accompanied by exquisite crystal vases holding vibrant floral arrangements.

THE HEAVENLY PARADE AND MANSIONS: Brandon witnesses a magnificent celebratory parade on manicured golden streets, honoring the believers arriving home. The procession features royal purple and gold banners proclaiming the King of Kings and Lord of Lords, amid a joyful atmosphere filled with confetti and trumpet blasts. Jesus leads the parade on a stunning white horse adorned with a jewel-encrusted bridle featuring sapphires, pearls, and diamonds. Brandon also observes the diverse architectural desires of believers, ranging from quaint English Tudor-style cobblestone homes to massive, Cinderella-like castles, explaining that the grandeur of one's heavenly mansion directly reflects their capacity to believe God for great things during their earthly life.

SPIRITUAL WARFARE AND EARTHLY FAITH: Brandon shifts focus to the ongoing spiritual battle on Earth, warning that Satan is working furiously to steal, kill, and destroy because his own eternal fate is sealed in the lake of fire. Brandon emphasizes that God does not inflict sickness or poverty upon His people, as such things do not exist in heaven. Instead, Brandon urges believers to expand their faith capacity and expect heavenly blessings on Earth, sharing his personal conviction that his daughter Megan will be completely healed of autism. Brandon encourages believers to remain resilient against demonic attacks and earthly trials, likening a steadfast Christian to a weighted inflatable clown toy that constantly bounces back up no matter how hard it is struck.

SALVATION AND DELIVERANCE PROCLAMATIONS: Brandon guides individuals through a heartfelt prayer of salvation, urging them to confess their sins, believe in the resurrection of Jesus, and secure their names in the Lamb's Book of Life. Following this, Brandon conducts an extensive session of spiritual warfare and healing declarations, commanding the restoration of physical ailments such as thyroid issues, kidney failure, fatty liver disease, gallstones, and even the supernatural regrowth of hair. Brandon also commands deliverance from severe mental and emotional afflictions, specifically targeting depression, anxiety, PTSD, Alzheimer's, dyslexia, and the lingering shame of abusive relationships, while breaking the chains of debilitating addictions to pornography, alcohol, fentanyl, and cocaine.

GLOBAL GEOPOLITICS AND REVIVAL: Brandon issues fervent spiritual decrees concerning global affairs, specifically praying to bridle leaders like Putin and Zelensky to prevent nuclear war and ensure peace across Ukraine, Poland, and NATO territories. Brandon invokes divine protection and wisdom over Israel and Benjamin Netanyahu, declaring a massive global revival and harvest of souls. This anticipated spiritual awakening is prophesied to sweep across vast regions, specifically naming Asia, the Middle East, South America, Australia, Mexico, Saudi Arabia, Turkey, Jordan, Syria, Iraq, Iran, Afghanistan, Egypt, Africa, Europe, Russia, Canada, and the United States.
rawData: [June 09, 2025]-[I want to encourage you - the Lord gave me a glimpse of heaven – it’s Christmas in June]-[https://youtu.be/OLDaeVaMw6E]-[Hello everybody. I'm Brandon Biggs, and this is Diana Biggs, and welcome to today's broadcast. I told you all for my birthday one year, the Lord said, 'I want to give you a little present.' I was in prayer, and I was just seeking Him. He said, 'I want to show you something.' All of a sudden, I was interceding for my birthday, and I was seeing in the spirit. I saw these beautiful mountains with snow caps on the top of them. They looked like the Swiss Alps—absolutely beautiful mountains. There was a green valley with grass that was just the most beautiful, translucent-looking grass. It was gorgeous grass with flowers, like a meadow with butterflies. It was just the most beautiful backdrop with these mountains, a lake, and this beautiful scenery all around. Diana was doing cartwheels, and the Lord said, 'This is moments after the Rapture.' We were standing there in heaven. I was a young man; I looked a lot younger and I had hair. I had a glorified body, and Diana had her glorified body. She said, 'Brandon, we made it! We made it!' She was doing cartwheels, and she was just rejoicing and running through this meadow. It was green all around, with a beautiful green hill, and she was running and rejoicing. It was just so beautiful. I was breathing in the beautiful atmosphere of heaven for the very first time. Whenever you get to a hotel room or go to a place on vacation where you've never been, you want to see everything and all the sights around because you're just excited to be there. Multiply that by a billion. That's what this felt like: we made it. And the temperature—I remember I could feel it—it was like I was there. The atmosphere was about 65 to 70 degrees. It wasn't hot, but it wasn't cold. It was a perfect temperature. Everything was perfect, and you could see those mountains, and it was just beautiful. I want to tell you all, heaven is a real place. Most people go, 'Well, is it?' No, I've seen it. I've been there. I've seen it—it is a massive, planet-like place. It is humongous. When I was taken back and I was coming to the Earth, it was in a ripple, how He had it hidden. It was a massive place, like three times the size of Jupiter, and there was no darkness at all. Everything was glowing. There were no shadows because there is no darkness. How do you explain that to somebody? Because all we know are shadows—there are shadows on the table. But there, there is no darkness. Everything is beautiful. Then one day I was praying, and the Lord told me to tell you all about this. That's how that basically ended; He allowed me to see Diana doing the cartwheels, and I was just looking over the horizon at the beauty of an area of heaven. I don't know if my house was nearby there or not, but I wouldn't mind it in that green valley, by that lake, and those mountains with the snow tops. The things He has for every single one of you! If you only knew how much He loves you. If you just read your Bible and look at whenever it says that God is love, God loves you. He gave His one and only begotten Son, that whosoever believes in Him should not perish but have everlasting life. Every single one of us has an opportunity today to say yes to Jesus and no to hell. Every single one of us. You have a hell to shun and a heaven to gain. Rodney Howard-Browne talks about that. But I just want to encourage you all that when we go in the Rapture... I was praying one day, just like I always do. I said, 'Lord, what are you up to today? What is going on with you?'—just being personal with Him. And He said, 'Brandon, I'm going to show you what I'm doing.' He opened up a portal above me. It was a beautiful portal, and Jesus looked out through that portal and said, 'I'm going to show you what I'm doing today.' Just like that, right up here. All of a sudden, I went into that portal in the spirit. I went into that portal that He opened up above our living room, and I could see millions of plate settings that stretched forever, lined up on these beautiful tables. I'm talking beautiful wood tables with a gloss on them, not cheap plastic tables from Walmart. Each one of them had a name tag prepared for each one of us. There was a doily in the middle, and beautiful fine china with golden lace around it. It was all specifically designed for you out of the desires of your heart—the things that you find beautiful and attractive, things where you go, 'Wow, that makes me so happy, Lord. Thank you for that.' Because God loves beautiful things. He is meticulous in everything He does; He cares about every single detail concerning every single one of you. Even your name is on that name card in the center of those plates. On my plate, what He was showing me, I saw Brandon Biggs and I saw a translucent-looking lily plate that was beautiful because I love flowers. I am a flower person; I love landscaping and flowers. I could spend hours just pulling weeds and making things look beautiful. I love flowers of all His creation—it's a big deal for me. I saw that my plate was a lily, and it was pink and beautiful. Then the one next to me was white-looking china, and I saw the settings of the forks. Then there were some plates down over here that had chopsticks in them because not everybody likes to use a fork. That's neat! There are some people who like chopsticks. They might say, 'Well, what are we going to eat?' I don't know. The Bible says the marriage supper of the Lamb. What is that? I don't know. Maybe we'll eat lamb—I have no idea, folks. I just know that there's a reception, and I saw the reception He was preparing for the bride, and it was beautiful. There was lace and beautiful things throughout the trees, and there were twinkle lights in that lace, powered by Holy Spirit power, I guess. They were like little lightning bugs all inside of this lace, and it was wrapped in tulle in these humongous oak trees, like weeping willows. You know how you see those down in New Orleans where the moss is dangling out of those trees? It was like that, but there was gorgeous-looking lace in this massive tree next to the table. Beautiful! It was a ginormous tree, not some skinny tree. I'm talking about trees with huge trunks. They were all in the atmosphere above, wrapped in tulle with little twinkle lights. I could see all of that. Then they had flower arrangements on all the tables in crystal vases—beautiful things that fanned out with all kinds of beautiful purples, greens, baby's breath, and beautiful lavender and pink flowers. It was done so perfectly. All of it. And they were on all the tables and all the doilies and all of it. It was just so like a beautiful, beautiful wedding reception. And then I don't want to cut it too short because I always try to tell y'all the things about it, and sometimes I add more to it because I'm like, you know, why hurry? Why hurry? You know, if you want to listen to it, fine. If you don't, fine. Fast forward it. But it was just beautiful, and it was, as far as I could see, plates and things ready for the people, and they were all okay. So one table setting was like this, and the table was all like an old English-looking table, like what you would see in a royal castle, like for the queen, because the table was all like it was all cut out like from a single piece of wood. It wasn't like, you know, like we make our cheap-looking tables today. We're talking it looked like Prince George, like, you know, like the old beds. It looked like the legs on that table were all kind of engraved wood. Engraved, and so you could see it, but it was a darker wood, a lighter wood, and then a darker wood. And it flushed in like it was just like marble-looking wood. And it was gorgeous. And then the Lord showed me the tables, but they went table, aisle, table, aisle, and every single person was just ready for them. And it went as far as you could see. I mean, you know, we're talking millions of people here. I don't know if it's by shift or whatever. You come by the generation. I don't know. How are you going to have the reception for all those people? But heaven's huge. But I'm just saying it just, you know, for what I could see, it was for hundreds of thousands. I don't know. I don't tell that it was millions of places for what I could see, but it was amazing. And then I could see the English Tudor houses. Oh, yeah, the old cobblestone homes. And see, in that generation of people, whether it's 1700s or whatever, that was their heart's desire. The Bible says that he's making a mansion for every single one of us, and it would be our heart's desire. So, your heart's desire in this modern day, your house is going to look a lot different than theirs. So if they were in the 1600s and 1500s, their heart's desire was just an English-style house. And it was gorgeous, but it was all perfect. The cobblestone on the side of this house was all perfect. And I could see it, and it was like going through a downtown, going through an old downtown because there were houses on both sides, and I could see the old roofs, the way they had it. And then the streets were gold, and it went up, and there was a curve, and there was grass, beautiful cut grass, perfect grass that was just like manicured like a golf course. Perfect. And they were having parade practice. And I said, "Lord, what are y'all doing?" He said, "We're getting ready for the celebration of you coming home." And I saw the banners, the royal banners of people, and it said 'King of Kings' and 'Lord of Lords' on these banners that were written out in gold letters that looked like on a royalty purple, a deep purple with golden letters. And it had beautiful tooling on the side, this beautiful like embroidery of gold. And it was purple with golden letters that said 'King of Kings' and 'Lord of Lords'. And they were standing there, and the people were standing there in their robes, and they had their heavenly garments on, all different styles of clothes, all different styles of outfits, the way they looked. Not everybody was the same, but everybody was worshiping, and they were saying, "For he is good and his mercy endures forever, for the Lord is good and his mercy endures forever." And as he was marching down the street on the golden street, Jesus was riding his horse, and he had a crown on his head that looked like it had a white around it with this black-looking leopard stuff, and it went up in purple and gold and went up like this. And it had a thing on the top, and he had a purple-looking cloak on with a white embroidery around it, and then he had this beautiful outfit, a robe-like, gown-looking thing, and he was on his horse. And his horse bridle, I've said this, it has beautiful jewels all throughout that bridle on that horse's bit going up through, and where he was holding the reins, it was beautiful—the jewels and the sapphires and the pearls and the diamonds and everything was on his bridle and what goes on the horse's chest. And he rode it up in the spirit realm, and I could see him riding on it, and his horse was beautiful white. It was a beautiful-looking, white-looking horse. It was gorgeous. It's absolutely gorgeous. And all the people, and you could see confetti in the air. Like confetti-like stuff was in the air, and how it was blowing at all times I have no idea because I don't know that celebration, but it was in the atmosphere, and it was on the streets, and it was being shaken like you'd see on New Year's Eve when the ball drops in Times Square and all the confetti is coming, but it was in the air, in the atmosphere. Colors and things were moving around as people were walking down, and they were blowing their horns and their trumpets, and they were sounding the praises of him, the King of Kings and the Lord of Lords. Beautiful. But the people were excited that we were coming home. All our loved ones that have gone on before us, that have passed on, ladies and gentlemen, to be absent from the body is to be present with the Lord. And they are waiting for us. They are the great cloud of witnesses that are waiting on us, ladies and gentlemen, that are celebrating our soon return, that Jesus has paid the price for every single one of you to not go to hell. Thank you, Jesus. If you just accept him and turn from your sin and your wicked ways, Jesus has paid the price for every single one of you so you can go to heaven with him for eternity. I know a lot of you don't get it. There's a lot of you that are so lost, but I pray for you every day that the eyes of your understanding would be enlightened, that you would know the hope of your calling and how much he loves you, that he paid the price for every single one of you to walk in victory, going from glory to glory to glory. There was a stream, looked like a bridge, where the parade ended. It looked like it went a long way, but I could see the people, and they were lining both sides of the streets waiting for the people, like celebrating, getting ready for the people. And there was a bridge, the gold streets, the brick gold streets went over the bridge. And there was a stream going through there. And then there was a massive castle that was right in front of it right here. A humongous, I'm talking ginormous-looking castle that was over here. Now, I don't know whose house that was, but they had big desires. Some people, if you only believe for small, you only get small because that was the desire of your heart. He's not going to override what you're believing for. What's your chokehold? How big is your faith and what you're believing for with God? God's limitless, but he will only move at your ability to believe him for it. Even in your heart's desires, he doesn't override you. You've got to stretch yourself. You've got to learn how to believe God for bigger. Some people have a measure of faith like the scripture. Some people have a chokehold where you have to look at your chokehold. If I tell you to believe God for a million dollars, you say, "Ah, that's not a big deal." Some people would say that. And some people go, "Oh my goodness, that's a lot of money." Some people go, "That's not that big." Then if I say you believe God for $10 million and then you go, "That's," and then somebody says, "That's not that bad." And then somebody says, "I'm believing God for a hundred million dollars," and you go, "Woo, wow, $100 million." That's what I'm trying to talk about: your choke point. Where does your faith go and you go, you know, where you go, "That's a lot," you know, versus "That's nothing"? Grow bigger in your capacity to believe God for more. Stretch your faith to believe him for exceedingly abundantly above all you dare ask or think, even in the next life. Some people, if you think like $1,000, you know, is a lot, you start out where your faith is $100. I can believe God for $100. So, you believe $100 ten times. It doesn't make you less than. No, I'm just trying to tell you to stretch yourself because I saw houses that were beautiful. But I'm not running their house down in heaven by no means, because it makes anything on this earth look like a shack compared to a glorified house. But I'm just saying I could see massive castles. Wow. Somebody was believing for a massive castle and they got it. Wow. I don't know who it was, but I saw their house and I was like, "Are you kidding me?" That looked like a king's castle, but it wasn't where the Lord stayed. It was somebody's house. And this place was massive. It was gorgeous. And I could see trees around it and some, like, not like, you know, like that peat moss, like moss stuff growing on it. Gorgeous looking like greenery and stuff around this castle. And it was on this hill above the golden street and it was over like over here from where they're having the parade. I look forward to it all the time. I look forward to it because there's loved ones over there that I miss: my grandfather and my grandma. There's people over there that you go, "Huh, I know they're waiting on us." And when we get there, I wonder if we'll recognize them that much because of how young they'll look in their glorified bodies. You'll go, "Wow, you look great," you know? Yeah. You know, because when I saw myself, I looked really great. I had good hair. I was like, "Hey, I've got good hair. Thank you, Lord." So, you look the same as always, babe. And I think in your glorified body, you look the same to me. But I mean seriously, it's amazing what the Lord's going to do. You know, there's a lot of good that President Trump's wanting to do, but the devil is going to try to throw a monkey wrench as much as he can to delay things and cause things not to happen because he knows his time is short. So, he is working at full capacity even when we're sleeping. Because he was there and he got kicked out, and he is ticked off that every single one of you have the opportunity to get what he had, and he can't have it no more in the presence of the great God Jehovah for the rest of our lives. And his plan is the lake of fire, hell, and on earth. He's going to be burning for eternity forever and ever and ever with every one of his little devils that tormented and destroyed people's lives. Their eternity is hell. Hell, hell. And I am so grateful that God, you know, that his time is coming short. It's over. Yes. And he is freaking out right now because he knows, and he's trying to speed things up so he can try to cause as many of you to go to hell with him as he can. That's his whole plan. He does not care. He knows his time's up. He knows he can't stop it. But what gets God the most? What does God find valuable? What does God see that's valuable? Is it the gold? No. He makes streets out of it. It's concrete to him. Is it the diamonds? No. He makes bridles out of them for horses. What does he find that's important? It's you and me, ladies and gentlemen. We're what's important to him. He sent his one and only son to die for you. The most beautiful thing that he could ever do was give his life for you freely. He didn't do it grudgingly. He did it because he wanted to. But he didn't know sickness. He didn't know disease. He didn't know sin. So he became sin for us. He became sickness. He had to receive that by faith by yielding himself to it and saying, "I became it. I have to do this. I'm going to take it." And then it came all on him willingly. He willingly did it for you and me. And the thing that the devil wants to try to do the most is to get you to believe a lie that he doesn't love you, that he doesn't have a plan for you, that he doesn't care anything about you. There is no poverty. Trust me, I've seen the houses. There is no poverty in heaven. So, he can't. And he has the cattle on a thousand hills. It seems now that that's just a small thing. Trust me, he has a storehouse. He has it all laid up for you. He wants you to have it on earth as it is in heaven. But it's your choice as to your capacity of what you want to believe him for. How much do you want to believe God for big? Do you believe God for big in your life? Do you believe that he'll meet all your needs according to his riches in glory by Christ Jesus? Do you believe that if you give, it shall be given unto you—good measure, pressed down, shaken together, running over? Will men give into your bosom? That he'll give you creative ideas to get wealth in Deuteronomy 28, that you're the head, not the tail, above and not beneath, you'll go through and not go under? Because he has it all up there in heaven, but he wants to make sure you live it on this earth, too. We're ambassadors of the Lord Jesus Christ, and he dwells on the inside of us. And he doesn't want to see us busted and disgusted, barely getting by. Well, we're just holding the fort. He wants us to be the kids that are victorious in every area of our life. And so, I want to encourage you today. Don't just wait for heaven. Have heaven on earth. Believe God for big. I'm believing for my Megan. I'm believing for me. I'm believing for all kinds of stuff all the time. Believing him for exceedingly abundantly. That Megan will talk, that Megan will completely be healed of autism. I believe with all my heart that she'll be on here sitting next to Diana and I, telling you her testimony that Jesus healed her and that she'll have her full manifestation. And you say, 'How can you get on here and tell us that Jesus is a healer whenever you're still believing for something?' Because my circumstances don't validate the word of God. The word of God validates itself. It says he became sickness for us. He became poverty for us. He said by his stripes you were healed, and that settles it. I'm not moved by what I see. I'm not moved by what I feel. I'm moved by what the word of God says. Regardless of what your circumstances say, Abraham staggered not at the promise of God through unbelief, but was strong in faith, giving glory to God because he was fully persuaded that what God had promised, he was able also to perform it. And I believe that the moment my heart stops, the moment I take my last breath on this earth, to be absent from the body is to be present with the Lord, and that my name is written in the Lamb's book of life. I believe with all my heart, I've seen it. I've seen that we go home and be with him, and the day we breathe our last, the instant we're right in front of him. And there will be a generation that doesn't taste death, that we will have that opportunity to not taste death. And we are that generation. He told me that. And I believe with all my heart there will be a day that in a twinkling of an eye we'll be changed and caught up, and the dead in Christ will rise first. We're going to be caught up with him, and we're going to go for seven years with him and look around, and then we're coming back. We're coming back. Are you going to be a part of that? Do you believe that Jesus wants to save your soul? Do you say, 'Well, I believe he wants to save their soul. I've been really bad, man. I've done some really bad things. I don't believe that Jesus will forgive me for all the things that I've done.' You're wrong. He said, 'If you confess your sins, he is faithful and just to forgive us.' You know, when he hits me and I start crying. You say, 'Well, he will never forgive me for all that I've done.' You're wrong. The Bible says if you confess your sins, he is faithful and just to forgive you of your sins and cleanse you of all unrighteousness. All you have to do is believe it by faith that he died and rose again on the third day, and that he died for you. You have to believe that Jesus paid the price for you. You have to believe it and just believe with all your heart. Don't be moved by what you see. Just because you have a little sin in your life, still maybe after you get born again, you walk your salvation out with fear and trembling. Keep going. When you fall, you brush it off and you keep standing and you keep getting back up. It's like that old clown. You see that old clown, you punch him in the head and then that old airbag clown comes back up and he keeps standing. He keeps standing. No matter how bad the devil tries to knock you down like that little clown, the clown always stands back up and he's still grinning from ear to ear. And he keeps standing. He keeps fighting. That's the way you've got to be. He's going to throw his punches at you, but you keep standing, standing on the inside. That clown was standing on the inside. He's not going to give up. He keeps rolling back. So, I want you to repeat this prayer after me. You say, 'Brother Brandon, I want to get saved. I want to give my heart to Jesus Christ.' Today's your day. That table out there will have your name tag on it after today. When you say this prayer with me, he's preparing a place for you. I feel the Lord so strong. He will have that mansion getting it ready for you right now. The moment you say this prayer after me and you believe in your heart today, I believe you're saved. So, I want you to say this prayer with me. It could just be something simple. You don't have to make it all religious. You just say something from your heart. He made it so that a child can get born again. Ladies and gentlemen, we think we have to come to him as spiritual adults having everything figured out, but all he's looking for is a childlike faith, just to believe by faith that he saved your soul. So, I want you to repeat this prayer after me: 'Jesus, I believe you died for me. I believe you're the Son of God. I believe that you died and rose again on the third day. I want my name to be written in the Lamb's book of life. I am a sinner, Lord, and I confess my sins before you. You said you'd be faithful and just to forgive me of my sins and cleanse me from all unrighteousness. I want to come home. I want to be born again. I want my name written in that Lamb's book of life. I don't want to go to hell. I want to come to heaven with you. I want to make you my Lord and personal savior. Jesus, I need you. Jesus, I want you, and I want you to be my Lord, and I want you to guide me for the rest of my days. As long as I'm on this earth, Lord, and even in the time after, I want to make you my Lord. I want to make you my friend. I want to be compassionate. I want to have passion. And I want to touch those that are around me for the kingdom of God today, telling them what you did on that cross, telling them that you died for them, telling them that you rose again on the third day for them. Being the biggest witness I can be for you, Lord, as I yield my life over to you, being sold out. I'm sold out for Jesus today. I'm sold out for the kingdom today.' That's all you got to do right there. Say it with all your heart. Now, find you a Bible that you understand. Find a version of the Bible. Doesn't have to be King James. Find something that will minister to you, that you'll get a hold of. Read your Bible every day and pray. Come on this channel and pray with us. We'll be here. We're excited you got born again today. Best decision you'll ever make. I don't know how you people live without him. And yeah, I'm not saying everything's always going to be easy being a Christian now, because I'm not going to lie to you.
